text:
(also known as Evangelion Chronicle 04 p.12 is a fictional character from the Neon Genesis Evangelion franchise. He is the teacher of Shinji and other students of class 2-A.

Profile

He is an old man, wearing a white shirt and black frame glasses who is seen teaching the students of class 2-A. He has a habit of talking about Second Impact.

History

Neon Genesis Evangelion

Trivia

His true name is unknown.
He is also known as 's Teacher, since he came from this location before the Second Impact. Neon Genesis Evangelion: the Iron Maiden 2nd Official Visual Book p. 24
